text: Moving from a quiet, open space into this vibrant and intellectually stimulating exhibit, I feel a surge of curiosity and wonder. The abstract colors and bold letters on the wall evoke both a sense of play and serious inquiry. In this moment, I am aware of the tension between the clarity of knowledge and the ambiguity of discovery—a reminder that philosophy often lives in this space of questioning and exploration. I feel inspired, and a bit reflective, pondering our evolving relationship with technology and the wisdom we seek from it.
